name: Aircall
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Aircall
metaTitle: Build AI Support and Internal Agents for Aircall
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Aircall for call lookups, conversation summaries, handoffs, updates, and approved workflows in support and internal operations.
intro: Aircall helps teams manage voice and messaging conversations across support and sales channels. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the Aircall workflow you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a reusable Skill for a customer-facing support agent or a private internal AI assistant. The result is an AI agent that can answer questions, look up call context, prepare handoffs, trigger approved actions, and summarize outcomes inside the rules you define.
supportUseCases: Let a DocsBot support agent look up recent Aircall calls, call outcomes, or contact details while answering a customer in a website chat or helpdesk ticket.
Use an Aircall Skill to summarize a caller’s recent interaction history so the AI agent can give a faster and more informed support response.
Have the agent create or update approved Aircall records during a support conversation, such as adding notes, tagging outcomes, or preparing follow-up context.
Enable the agent to trigger a bounded callback or routing workflow in Aircall when a customer needs live phone assistance or escalation.
Let the agent prepare a clean handoff summary from the customer conversation and Aircall activity so a human teammate can continue without repeating questions.
internalUseCases: Employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or an internal chat to retrieve Aircall call history, contact context, and recent conversation notes.
Support and operations teams can ask the agent to summarize daily call activity, unresolved follow-ups, or escalation patterns from Aircall for faster internal reporting.
Managers can use an internal AI assistant to gather Aircall interaction details before coaching sessions, QA reviews, or customer renewal conversations.
Team members can chat with the agent to complete SOPs that involve Aircall updates, note creation, routing requests, or handoff preparation across connected systems.
Internal agents can combine Aircall data with company knowledge to research customer issues, explain next steps, and trigger approved follow-up workflows.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that retrieves recent Aircall call details before replying to a customer ticket.
A call summary Skill that turns Aircall activity into clean escalation notes for human agents.
An internal assistant that finds missed callbacks and prepares follow-up action lists for support teams.
A workflow Skill that tags Aircall interactions based on customer issue type or urgency.
A private team agent that answers questions about call outcomes, contact history, and open follow-ups.
A handoff Skill that combines website chat context with Aircall records for smoother live support transfers.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the Aircall agent to do in plain language, such as looking up call history, summarizing interactions, or triggering an approved callback workflow.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a reusable Skill, chooses the safest workflow design, identifies the required configuration values, and defines secure connection and authentication handling for Aircall.

howItWorks.title: Security is built in
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime configuration, keeps credentials out of chats and Skill instructions, scopes access to the minimum records and actions needed, and adds approval boundaries for sensitive steps.

howItWorks.title: It tests real scenarios
howItWorks.description: DocsBot’s automated testing agent runs imagined support and internal team scenarios, checks for bugs, weak instructions, missing safeguards, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated improvement loop.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once the Skill is improved and approved, Skill Builder helps deploy it to your customer-facing DocsBot widget, helpdesk agent, or private team assistant so it can take bounded action inside Aircall.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with Aircall?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the Aircall task you want in plain language and DocsBot designs the Skill, secures the connection, tests the workflow, and prepares it for deployment. The finished agent can look up call data, summarize interactions, update approved records, and trigger bounded follow-up actions.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Aircall data while replying to customers?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use an Aircall Skill to retrieve call history, contact details, notes, and conversation context while responding in a website chat widget or helpdesk flow. That helps the agent answer with better context and prepare cleaner human handoffs when needed.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can DocsBot automate with Aircall?
faq.answer: DocsBot can help automate call lookups, interaction summaries, note creation, callback preparation, escalation handoffs, and other approved Aircall actions. You define the boundaries, and the agent works within those rules instead of taking open-ended actions.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant help employees work inside Aircall?
faq.answer: Yes, private DocsBot agents can help employees retrieve Aircall records, summarize recent conversations, research account history, and complete repeatable workflows through chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams. This is useful for support operations, coaching prep, escalations, and follow-up management.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Aircall actions secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines the needed configuration, keeps secrets out of chat and source instructions, proxies credentials through secure runtime settings, and scopes permissions to the smallest practical set of actions and records. It can also add approval steps or limits for sensitive updates and workflow triggers.

faq.question: Do I need to write code to connect DocsBot to Aircall?
faq.answer: No, the setup is centered on describing the outcome you want. Skill Builder handles the design, secure connection approach, testing, improvement, and deployment details for the Skill.

brand.title: Aircall
brand.description: Aircall is a collaborative, AI-powered customer communications platform that unifies voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and social media channels into a single platform. It integrates with over 200 business apps, automates repetitive tasks, and delivers actionable insights to supercharge sales and support teams, empowering them to deliver personalized customer experiences and build stronger relationships.
brand.slogan: Unify, Automate, and Elevate Customer Conversations with AI Power
